title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embeddings endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark/light themes).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Use any Ollama model as a GitHub Copilot replacement inside VS Code with a lightweight extension.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and Docker Compose examples for running Ollama.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, refactor or chat with any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate offering strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that connects to a local Ollama instance and supports conversation history export.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA, chat and embeddings in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# / .NET SDK for Ollama with async I/O and strongly-typed request/response objects.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models; supports Windows, macOS and Linux.
